title: Vacancy for Teacher at Lovely Professional University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Lovely Professional University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
